authority.heading: Playfair Display
authority.vibe: Traditional law firm meets modern precision

reliability.heading: Inter
reliability.vibe: System font reliability, proven at scale

layoutDescriptions.clean-grid: Structured CSS Grid layout with defined columns, consistent gutters (gap: 2rem), and predictable rhythm. Use repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)) for responsive cards. Sections stack vertically with clear boundaries. Professional, organized, trustworthy.
layoutDescriptions.organic: Fluid asymmetrical layout with overlapping elements, clip-path section transitions, and magazine-style flow. Use grid-template-columns like '1fr 1.3fr' or '2fr 1fr' instead of equal columns. Sections flow into each other with wave dividers or diagonal cuts. Creative, dynamic, memorable.
layoutDescriptions.editorial: Typography-forward layout with varied column widths, pull quotes with oversized type, and publication-quality spacing. Mix full-width sections with constrained content columns (max-width: 65ch for reading). Use display fonts at 4-6rem for impact. Thoughtful, curated, authoritative.
layoutDescriptions.archival: Museum-catalog aesthetic with clean labeling, monospaced accents for data/categories, generous whitespace, and minimal decoration. Grid with precise alignment. Use subtle borders instead of background colors to define sections. Refined, intellectual, timeless.

scrollAnimations.reducedMotion: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .animate-on-scroll, .slide-left, .slide-right, .scale-reveal { animation: none !important; opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; } }

glassmorphism.card: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-radius: 16px;
glassmorphism.nav: background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(150%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(150%); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
glassmorphism.navDark: background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(150%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(150%); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
glassmorphism.heroOverlay: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.4), rgba(0,0,0,0.1)); backdrop-filter: blur(4px);

microInteractions.magneticButton: transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 0.3s ease; &:hover { transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
microInteractions.cardReveal: transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 0.4s ease; &:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
microInteractions.slidingUnderline: position: relative; &::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; width: 0; height: 2px; background: currentColor; transition: width 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } &:hover::after { width: 100%; }
microInteractions.imageZoom: overflow: hidden; & img { transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } &:hover img { transform: scale(1.05); }
microInteractions.focusRing: :focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand-primary, currentColor); outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; transition: outline-offset 0.2s ease; }

depthLayers.floatingElement: box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 16px; transform: translateZ(0);
depthLayers.sunkenInput: box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 8px;

antiAIMarkers.mixedMediaSizing: /* Vary image aspect ratios: 3:4 portrait, 16:9 landscape, 1:1 square in same grid */
antiAIMarkers.editorialPullQuote: font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem); font-style: italic; border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-primary); padding-left: 1.5rem; max-width: 50ch; margin: 3rem auto;
antiAIMarkers.textWrap: h1, h2, h3 { text-wrap: balance; } p { text-wrap: pretty; }
antiAIMarkers.customScrollbar: ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 4px; }

frameworkColors._description: Common framework grays to filter from brand detection. These are default Bootstrap, Tailwind, and Material Design neutral colors that pollute brand color extraction.
